api.memefastDesc: 543+ のAIモデルを1つの場所で — GPT、Claude、Gemini、DeepSeek、Sora など。

api.getKeyArrow: Moyin API でキーを取得 →
api.concurrencyHint: 同時に実行するタスク数（複数キー利用時に増やす／キー数を超えないように）。
api.aboutTagline: v{{version}} · AIアニメ＆ショート動画の絵コンテ作成ツール

errors.customBaseUrl: Custom providers require a Base URL.

editProviderDialog.title: Edit provider
editProviderDialog.name: Name
editProviderDialog.apiKeysPlaceholder: Enter API keys (one per line, or comma-separated)
editProviderDialog.apiKeysHint: Multiple keys rotate automatically; on failure the next key is used.
editProviderDialog.modelHint: Separate multiple models with commas; the first is the default.

script_analysis.name: Script analysis / chat
script_analysis.description: Turn story text into structured script data

character_generation.name: Image generation
character_generation.description: Generate character and scene reference images
character_generation.recommendation: 💎 Recommended: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro) — strong quality and consistency.

freedom_image.name: Freedom — image
freedom_image.description: Separate image model for Freedom (falls back to Image generation if empty)
freedom_image.recommendation: 🎨 Set image models for Freedom only; other panels are unchanged.

freedom_video.name: Freedom — video
freedom_video.description: Separate video model for Freedom (falls back to Video generation if empty)
freedom_video.recommendation: 🎬 Set video models for Freedom only; other panels are unchanged.

featureBinding.title: Service mapping
featureBinding.noModels: No models available yet — sync models from a provider first.
featureBinding.multiSelectHint: Multi-select: requests rotate across models (3s interval).
featureBinding.memefastGroups: Selected MemeFast models support these groups:
featureBinding.memefastKeyHint: Add keys for each group in the memefast.top console — more keys improve reliability.
featureBinding.invalidBindingNote: Stale bindings are kept; they work again when models return.
featureBinding.partialWarningBody: Pick a provider/model for each feature above and ensure the API key is set.
featureBinding.helpPolling: Multi-model rotation: picks models in order (3s between calls) to reduce rate limits.
featureBinding.helpFromProviders: Options come from each provider’s model list; expand to multi-select.

advanced.title: Advanced generation
advanced.subtitle: These options affect video generation in the Director panel.
advanced.visualContinuityBody: Pass the previous shot’s end frame to the next as a reference for consistent look and characters.
advanced.visualContinuityHint: Recommended for continuous stories and longer videos.
advanced.resumeBody: After a batch stops, continue from the last position instead of restarting.
advanced.resumeHint: Recommended to avoid losing progress on network/API errors.
advanced.moderationBody: Skip a shot that hits moderation and keep generating the rest.
advanced.moderationHint: Recommended so one failure does not stop the whole run.
advanced.autoModelBody: First shot text-to-video (t2v), later shots image-to-video (i2v).
advanced.autoModelHint: Off by default · needs multiple models configured.
advanced.footerNote: These affect Director video generation. If unsure, keep defaults.

imagehost.title: Image host
imagehost.subtitle: Stores temporary images during video generation (e.g. end frames, handoff).
imagehost.infoBody: Image hosts store temporary frames for visual continuity. Without a host, cross-shot handoff is limited. Multiple hosts rotate; failures fall back automatically.
imagehost.infoScdn: SCDN is enabled by default without a key. ImgBB is off by default — enable and test if you use it.

storage.title: Storage
storage.subtitle: Sharing, data location, and cache.
storage.desktopOnly: Storage settings are only available in the desktop app.
storage.shareCharactersHint: When off, only the current project sees them
storage.shareScenesHint: When off, only the current project sees them
storage.shareMediaHint: When off, only the current project sees them
storage.moveWarning: Changing location moves existing data (creates projects/ and media/ subfolders).
storage.recoveryBody: After reinstall or a new machine, point to an existing data folder to restore projects.
storage.recoveryHint: Pick a folder that contains projects/ and media/, then restart the app.
storage.autoCheckHint: When on, the desktop app checks the remote manifest on launch.
storage.updatesDesktopOnly: Updates are only available in the packaged desktop app.

overview.workflowTitle: Moyin Creator — 基本ワークフロー
overview.workflowSubtitle: 手順は順番どおりに進めてください。途中の手順を省略しないでください。
overview.directorModuleTitle: ディレクターモジュール
scriptSteps: 脚本全文を貼り付ける
「脚本を全文インポート」をクリック
ビジュアルスタイルを選ぶ
シーンをクリックし、右サイドバーでシーンライブラリを開いて生成する
シーンパネル左サイドバーで生成して保存する
キャラクターをクリックし、右サイドバーでキャラクターライブラリを開いて外見を生成する
キャラクターパネルで「設定画（setting sheet）を生成」をクリック
directorSteps: ディレクターパネルを開く
左のツリーをクリック
必要なシーンの「+」をクリックして左のショットエディターに追加する
画像生成： 「Merged batch」を選び、必要に応じてパラメータと画像を選択する
画像生成が完了したら
主役キャラクターがいない場合：「Generate images」ボタンを使う
主役キャラクターがいる場合：絵コンテページの下にある「Generate video」ボタンを使う
overview.statsLine: {{episodes}} 話 · キャラクター {{characters}} · 陣営 {{factions}} · 重要アイテム {{items}}

Supported markers:
• Episode: Episode X — title (or EP.1)
• Scene: **1-1 day int. location**
• Cast: A, B
• Dialogue: Name: line
• △ stage direction
• [Subtitles] or similar notes

Continue and call the API to generate video?

sclass.tipGroupMode: Group mode: 2–4 shots per merged video, total ≤15s. Use “Regroup” to re-run auto grouping.
sclass.tipSingleMode: Single-shot mode: one video per shot. Click under a shot to edit prompts.
sclass.tipTrailerShared: Trailer shots share data with main shots — edits sync. Click text under each shot to edit prompts.
